title: cyamus pentapetalus
intro: Cyamus pentapetalus, also known as the Five-petaled Cyamus or Chinese Starwort, is a flowering plant in the family Caryophyllaceae. This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Cyamus pentapetalus are attributed to its ability to relieve fever, reduce swelling, and treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Cyamus pentapetalus can be prepared as an herbal tea or decoction, and it is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
